title: House of the Healers
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''House of the Healers''' or '''Healing House''' was a medical center on ''[[Cloud-Mother]]'', an [[Ithorian Herdship]]. The [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Drub McKumb]] was taken there in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] after attempting to warn [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] about the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
